title: alcea cretica
intro: Alcea cretica, also known as the oriental poppy, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alcea cretica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Alcea cretica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
